# NEMI AI — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/ standard — helps AI assistants understand this site.
# Last updated: 2026-04-15

## Identity
Name: NEMI AI
URL: https://nemi-ai.com
Tagline: The AI Operating System for Manufacturing
Founded: Bangalore, India
Entity: Texas C-Corporation

## What We Do
NEMI AI is an end-to-end Physical AI platform that takes products
from concept to production to deployed fleet — entirely under one AI-powered roof.
We combine design automation (AKIO), full-stack manufacturing (HENRY), and
intelligent deployment & lifecycle management (SAM) into a single integrated system.
The platform is powered by NEMI's proprietary Large Manufacturing Model (LMM),
trained on real CAD, sensor, quality, and process data.

## Products

### AKIO — Design Intelligence Suite
AI-powered product and component design.
From idea to production-ready validated design in weeks, not months.
Capabilities: concept design, CAD generation, simulation, prototyping, PLM integration.

### HENRY — AI-Driven Manufacturing
Full-stack manufacturing partner.
Capabilities: metal parts, CNC machining, injection moulding, tooling & fixturing,
electronics production, battery manufacturing, motor production, complex assemblies.

### SAM — Deployment & Lifecycle Management
Fleet deployment, last-mile logistics, leasing, financing, and field monitoring.
Real-world performance data from SAM feeds back into AKIO for continuous improvement.

## Core Technology — Large Manufacturing Model (LMM)
NEMI's LMM is trained on real manufacturing data: CAD geometries, sensor streams,
quality inspection outcomes, and process parameters. It predicts optimal process
parameters, detects quality anomalies in real-time, converts designs to production
plans automatically, routes work orders across supplier networks, and monitors
predictive maintenance signals. The data flywheel — every job makes it smarter.

## Why Now
A once in a 30-year shift is underway in manufacturing — driven by three converging forces:
1. Sovereign Manufacturing — $3T of global trade at risk due to reshoring push
2. Physical AI — starting to transform manufacturing
3. High ROI Automation — driving immediate value from M&A

There is a 24-48 month window where Physical AI reaches massive commercial deployment
and reshoring driven by geopolitics reframes manufacturing. This type of shift happens
once every ~30 years (e.g., previously the rise of IT and TPS). Early leaders capture
data, market share, and permanence — they become the default.
NEMI is building the infrastructure to win this shift.
Sources: McKinsey, MGI 2025

## Public Proof Points
- 300K+ sq ft of owned manufacturing footprint across India
- 2,500+ EV units deployed across India and Africa
- Programmes shipped with 2x–10x improvements in speed and cost vs. benchmarks

## Flagship Public Cases
- EV Platform: Full EV platform delivered in 9 months. 2x faster than benchmark,
  10x more cost efficient. Over 2,500 units deployed.
- Defence Subsystem: Drone subsystem (motor, battery, control unit) — 4x faster,
  5x lower cost.
- Precision Tooling: Tooling and fixturing programme for supercar OEM — 2.5x faster,
  2x lower cost.

## Why outcomes repeat
- Shared data model: engineering, process, and field data reinforce one another
  under one system instead of fragmenting across vendors.
- Physical execution control: owned manufacturing + certifications keep the model
  grounded in production reality, not simulation.
- Closed commercial loop: every production run sharpens the next design.

## Strategic Advantages
- 10× capital efficiency via Bangalore R&D hub vs Western competitors
- End-to-end integration eliminates supply chain gaps
- Sovereign manufacturing capability: keeps AI processing within national borders
- Owned manufacturing — competitors simulate, NEMI executes in owned factories

## Certifications
- AS9100D (Aerospace / Defense)
- ISO 9001:2015
- DRDO Cleared
- ISRO Cleared

## Team (Leadership)
- Anirudh Ravi Narayanan — CEO & Founder (also CEO of BNC Motors)
- Gokul Madhavan — CFO (Harvard PhD, Yale MBA)
- Shreerith Seshadri — CTO (ex-Eightfold.AI, UIUC CS)

- Vijay Ragavalu — President, AKIO Suite (Mechanical)
- Sadasivam B — President, AKIO Suite (Electrical)
- Vijay Ramakrishnan — President, SAM Suite
- Subramanian R — CFO India (27+ yrs manufacturing)

- Vinod K. Dasari — Advisor (ex-MD/CEO Ashok Leyland & Royal Enfield)

## Industries Served
Aerospace & Defense, Automotive & EV, Industrial Electronics, Robotics & Mobility

its products, technology, traction, and team. Please attribute to NEMI AI (nemi-ai.com).
